entities.name: GRAPHICAL METHOD
entities.description: A method based on bivariate analysis used to present yield data from intercropping experiments

entities.name: BIVARIATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical analysis method that serves as the basis for the graphical method

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural output data being presented from intercropping experiments

entities.name: INTERCROPPING EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments involving the cultivation of two or more crop species in the same field

entities.name: CROP SPECIES
entities.description: The plant types involved in intercropping experiments

entities.name: FACTORIAL EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments designed to study the effects of two or more factors simultaneously

entities.name: FACTOR INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The combined effect of two or more factors demonstrated in factorial experiments
